mapper.insert: insert into internship_time_settings ( application_start_date, application_end_date, company_confirmation_deadline, delay_application_deadline, report_cycle, start_date, end_date, report_deadline, evaluation_deadline, create_time, update_time, creator, updater, deleted ) values ( #{applicationStartDate}, #{applicationEndDate}, #{companyConfirmationDeadline}, #{delayApplicationDeadline}, #{reportCycle}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{reportDeadline}, #{evaluationDeadline}, NOW(), NOW(), #{creator}, #{updater}, 0 )
mapper.select: select * from internship_time_settings where deleted = 0 order by id desc limit 1
